response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including work with C and C++ in the past and a strong focus on performance and scalable systems. However, his recent work has predominantly involved high-level languages like TypeScript, JavaScript, and Node.js, with minimal focus on modern C++ development, STL, or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443-4-1). His lack of recent C++ specialization and cloud platform experience (only basic AWS CDK exposure) significantly reduces his fit for this role.
strengths: Strong background in high-performance computing (e.g., real-time systems, low-latency apps) and system design
Experience with scalable architectures and event-driven systems (e.g., GISCollective, micro-services at Dunnhumby)
Proven track record in mentoring and technical leadership (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, workshops, and open-source contributions)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant C++ work was in 2015 at National Instruments)
No demonstrated expertise in STL, multi-threading, or message brokers as required for the role
No clear evidence of adherence to IEC 62443-4-1 or industrial cybersecurity practices in recent roles
